channel.title: My Customized Papers - Last 24 Hours
channel.description: Research papers from the last 24 hours, filtered by keywords

item.title: [Communications Materials] Merons, hedgehogs and magnetoelectric switching in spiral multiferroics
item.description:
Communications Materials, Published online: 24 June 2026; doi:10.1038/s43246-026-01159-0

In spiral multiferroics, electric polarization linked to magnetic order presents opportunities for electric-field-driven magnetic memory devices, yet the mechanism of electrically moving magnetic domain walls is not well understood. Here, the authors reveal that domain walls host meron strings with topological defects which significantly influence the switching dynamics, offering insights into experimental observations and enhancing spin manipulation potential.
item.author: Communications Materials
